title: Enterprise Agent Applications
description: Applying agent patterns to enterprise verticals: data, support, DevOps, workflows, and governance

lessons.title: Enterprise Agent Landscape
lessons.description: Where agents create value in enterprises and what makes enterprise deployment different

lessons.title: Data Agents and Analytics Agents
lessons.description: Agents that query, analyze, and explain data using semantic layers and governed access

lessons.title: Knowledge and Support Agents
lessons.description: Enterprise knowledge search, customer support at scale, and source-grounded answers

lessons.title: DevOps and Software Operations Agents
lessons.description: Incident response, CI/CD triage, code review, and runbook automation agents

lessons.title: Workflow and Back-Office Agents
lessons.description: Document processing, approval chains, procurement, and structured process automation

lessons.title: Governance, Risk, and Compliance
lessons.description: Identity, audit, PII, regulatory compliance, and policy enforcement for enterprise agents

lessons.title: Enterprise Agent Adoption Lab
lessons.description: Design an enterprise agent system with governance, evaluation, and rollout strategy
